top_signals.title: SpaceX Post-Listing Collapse Threatens IPO Market’s AI Euphoria
top_signals.summary: SpaceX’s fall from its post-listing peak to below its IPO price in just a month poured cold water on the market for newly public companies, dragging a key gauge of this year’s debuts down with it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Port of Antwerp-Bruges Sees Decline in Goods in H1 2026
top_signals.summary: The Port of Antwerp-Bruges, against a backdrop of geopolitical tensions, trade conflicts, and operational disruptions, context handled 133.9 million tons of maritime goods in the first half of 2026, a decrease of 2.4% compared to the same period last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TSMC to invest additional $100 billion in Arizona after second-quarter profit soars 77%
top_signals.summary: TSMC announced a second-quarter profit, following its June revenue figures released earlier this week.

top_signals.title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
top_signals.summary: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
